name: Tsume Inuzuka
description:
Tsume Inuzuka is the mother of Hana and Kiba Inuzuka. Tsume has the same abilities as the rest of the Inuzuka Clan. She fights with her beloved companion, Kuromaru. It is currently unknown as to exactly what power she possesses, but since she is a Tokubetsu Jonin she is obviously an extremely skillful fighter. She can also use the Dual Piercing Fang as well as many more combinations with Kuromaru.  

(Source:  Naruto Wiki)
